creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for URL (upstream issue). I've worked around via older libc++, based on copy-pasta from other ports.

$ rg -l bundled-libcxx
emulators/yuzu/Makefile
x11/waybar/Makefile
x11/xdg-desktop-portal-hyprland/Makefile
x11-wm/gamescope/Makefile
x11-wm/hyprland/Makefile
